scripts.dev: corepack pnpm --filter @fileoctopus/ts-api build && corepack pnpm --filter @fileoctopus/ui build && corepack pnpm --filter @fileoctopus/frontend build && corepack pnpm --filter @fileoctopus/desktop-tauri tauri dev
scripts.test:backend:rc: cargo fmt --all --check && cargo check --workspace && cargo test --workspace && cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings
scripts.test:frontend:rc: corepack pnpm typecheck && corepack pnpm lint && corepack pnpm test && corepack pnpm build
scripts.rc:validate: corepack pnpm test:backend:rc && corepack pnpm test:frontend:rc
